priorities.title: Foundation Phase (Apr-May)
priorities.description: Infrastructure, content, audience growth, thought leadership. $0 revenue expected. Revenue starts June.

priorities.title: Grow Email List
priorities.description: Free playbook funnel live, need traffic sources. Blog article live with CTA.

priorities.title: Build X Presence
priorities.description: Outbound replies 2x/day, article content cadence built, 7 followers

pendingReview.title: Community Pre-Sell Strategy
pendingReview.summary: Discord-based Insider Community at $29/mo founding member pricing. 6-category structure, 3-email pre-sell sequence ready.

pendingReview.title: Brand Refresh: Amber Gold Direction
pendingReview.summary: New color palette with amber gold (#F59E0B) replacing purple. Space Grotesk + Inter typography. Wordmark-first logo approach.

pendingReview.title: SecurityBot Phase 1 Spec
pendingReview.summary: Cron-based system monitoring: gateway health, disk, security posture, business infra. 5 monitoring categories.

pendingReview.title: Test $47 Purchase Flow
pendingReview.summary: URGENT: 6th consecutive retro. 5-minute unblocked task. Confirms paid product works before driving traffic.

pendingReview.title: ContentBot Media Stack Budget
pendingReview.summary: ElevenLabs ($5/mo) + HeyGen ($29/mo) + DALL-E + Sora. Total $55-119/mo. Break-even at 2-4 playbook sales.

pendingReview.title: Skool Hobby Plan ($9/mo)
pendingReview.summary: Recommended over Discord (no payments) and Circle ($89/mo). Skool Hobby = $9/mo + 10% transaction fee. Built-in courses, gamification, Stripe. Upgrade at ~22 members.

pendingReview.title: LinkedIn Channel Launch
pendingReview.summary: Free API, self-serve, 60-day tokens, 3K char posts. Jose needs to create Developer App (5 min) to unblock.
